personalInfo.name: Sonam Kumari
personalInfo.title: Frontend Developer
personalInfo.intro: Creative and performance-driven Frontend Developer with 3+ years of experience building fast, scalable, and accessible React applications. Specialized in micro-frontends, Redux Toolkit, and modern UI systems. Strong focus on reusable abstractions, performance optimization, and developer experience.
personalInfo.jobStatus: Currently working as a Software Developer at Cygeniq. Open to impactful frontend and UI engineering roles focused on scalable architecture and modern tooling.

description: Developed and maintained a reusable component library improving accessibility and page performance by 60% (LCP, INP, CLS).
Implemented a scalable theming system (light/dark mode) aligned with design tokens.
Set up component documentation and visualization environment for better developer collaboration.
Standardized component APIs improving developer experience and consistency across applications.
Resolved dependency and build issues in large-scale frontend projects.
Integrated Playwright-based end-to-end testing for real browser interaction validation.
Integrated frontend systems with backend services and message queue configurations.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality production features.
Architected micro-frontend architecture using Module Federation enabling independent deployment.
Improved application load time by 30% using lazy loading, tree shaking, and optimized Webpack configuration.
Refactored state management using Redux Toolkit reducing unnecessary re-renders and improving UI performance.
Built accessible and user-friendly interfaces using Material UI, SASS, and ARIA standards.
Optimized build performance and reduced bundle size by excluding non-production code.
Developed complex forms using Formik and React Hook Form.
Implemented RBAC and secure routing using JWT and React Router.
Integrated analytics tools like Mixpanel and Amplitude for user behavior tracking.

projects.name: UI Component Library
description: Built a scalable and reusable component library used across multiple applications.
Improved accessibility and performance metrics significantly.
Standardized UI patterns and developer workflows.

projects.name: Micro-Frontend Architecture
description: Implemented Module Federation-based micro-frontend architecture.
Enabled independent deployments and improved scalability of frontend modules.

projects.name: Performance Optimization System
description: Optimized frontend performance using lazy loading, tree shaking, and bundle optimization.
Improved load times and Core Web Vitals significantly.

seo.title: Sonam Kumari | Frontend Developer
seo.description: Sonam Kumari is a frontend developer specializing in React, TypeScript, and scalable UI systems. Focused on performance optimization, micro-frontends, and design systems.
